user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a food allowance with applicable employees and an amount, so that eligible employees receive the correct tax-exempt food benefit
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Food Allowance screen; When I click Add food allowance and select applicable employees and enter an amount; Then the food allowance is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing food allowance, so that I can update the applicable employees or the amount
acceptance_criteria: Given a food allowance is listed; When I click Edit and change the employees or amount; Then the updated food allowance is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view food allowances with applicable employees and amount, so that I can confirm who receives the benefit and how much
acceptance_criteria: Given food allowances exist; When I open the Food Allowance screen; Then each entry shows its applicable employees and amount

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter food allowances by financial year, so that I see the allowances applicable to the selected year
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Food Allowance screen; When I select a financial year; Then only food allowances for that year are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the food allowance list, so that I always see the latest saved records
acceptance_criteria: Given I have made changes; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with the current data
